### [`v6.3.3`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/documentationjs/documentation/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​700httpsgithubcomdocumentationjsdocumentationcomparev633v700-2018-05-22)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/documentationjs/documentation/compare/v6.3.2...v6.3.3)

##### Features

-   Auto-detect readme filename ([4fd776b](https://renovatebot.com/gh/documentationjs/documentation/commit/4fd776b))

##### BREAKING CHANGES

-   the --readme-file option now has a smart default value
